35.reason: [Using fgets with buffer size 2014 on a 1024-byte array causes buffer overflow, leading to undefined behavior. Should be <=1024.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.2 , reason:  [Using 2014 as size for fgets with a 1024-byte buffer risks buffer overflow. Should be <=1024.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Using fgets with buffer size 2014 on a 1024-byte array causes buffer overflow, leading to undefined behavior. Should be <=1024.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [Buffer overflow risk: fgets reads up to 2013 characters into a 1024-byte buffer. Should be sizeof(s). But this is runtime, not compilation.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.2 , reason:  [Using 2014 as size for fgets with a 1024-byte buffer causes potential buffer overflow. Should be sizeof(s) or 1024.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.2 , reason:  [Buffer size mismatch: s is only 1024 bytes, but fgets reads up to 2013 characters plus null terminator, which can cause buffer overflow. Should be sizeof(s) or 1024.]
